name: Varunprasaath R. Selvaraju, Ph.D.
summary: PhD Chemist with 6+ years of experience in process development, analytical characterization, and CMC support for biopharmaceutical applications. Expertise in method development using HPLC, FT-IR, UV-Vis, and thermal analysis (TGA, DSC). Strong background in process optimization using DOE and SPC, scale-up support, and analytical development. Proven track record managing multiple projects and delivering high-quality data for process characterization.

education.degree: B.S. (Research), Major: Chemistry; Minor: Materials Science

bullets: Lead process development and optimization using DOE and statistical process control.
Develop analytical methods to support process characterization and quality control.
Developed and validated analytical methods using HPLC, FT-IR, UV-Vis, and mass spectrometry.
Supported process development through comprehensive materials characterization.

skills.Analytical Methods: HPLC, LC-MS, GC-MS, FT-IR, UV-Vis, TGA, DSC, NMR
skills.Process Development: Process optimization, DOE, SPC, scale-up support, CMC analytical support
